title: RubyMC Official
description: This official Modpack offers a curated selection of mods designed to enhance your gaming experience on RubyMC, featuring in-game proximity voice chat, visual enhancements and performance tweaks. These mods have been verified for compatibility with RubyMC.
body:
# Official ![spacer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59ca7eace2b486e17c1b7429f58f80c8f9b96681.png)![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84cbe502e3cdb0ad6f9507dc79320eb9a958db33.png) ![spacer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59ca7eace2b486e17c1b7429f58f80c8f9b96681.png)[RubyMC](https://discord.gg/rubymc)![spacer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59ca7eace2b486e17c1b7429f58f80c8f9b96681.png)Modpack This official Modpack offers a curated selection of mods designed to enhance your gaming experience on RubyMC, featuring in-game proximity voice chat, visual enhancements and performance tweaks. These mods have been verified for compatibility with RubyMC. ## Included Content ### Mods: Utility features > [ETF] Entity Texture Features
> [EMF] Entity Model Features
> Vectorientation
> Text Placeholder API
> Sound Physics Remastered
> Shulker Box Tooltip
> Plasmo Voice
> No Chat Reports
> More Chat History
> Mod Menu
> Iris Shaders
> Falling Leaves
> FabricSkyboxes
> Fabric API
> Essential Mod
> Emoji Type
> Eating Animation
> Cloth Config API
> Chat Heads
> Chat Animation
> Blur+ (Fabric) Performance > Sodium
> Dynamic FPS
> Lithium
> ImmediatelyFast
> FerriteCore
> Entity Culling
